tasks.title: Implement resolve-or-create for campaign/batch slugs
tasks.description:
In `packages/service-core/src/services/social/social-draft-ingestion.service.ts`, replace the resolve-only `resolveSlugToId` call for `campaignSlug`/`batchSlug` with a resolve-or-create helper: match by slug → associate; no match → create a new `social_campaigns`/`social_content_batches` row (name derived from the slug, `active: true`) and associate to it. Leave `audienceSlug`/`footerSlug`/`baseHashtagSetSlug` on the existing resolve-only path — only campaigns/batches get create semantics (G-4/G-5). Return `{ id, slug, isNew }` per resolved entity so callers can report the outcome.

Test requirements:
- Unit tests in `social-draft-ingestion.service.test.ts`: existing slug resolves without creating a row; unknown slug creates a new active row and returns `isNew: true`; audience/footer/hashtagSet slugs still fall back to null on miss (regression).

subtasks.title: Add resolveOrCreateCampaignOrBatch helper
Wire campaignSlug/batchSlug through the new helper
Unit test: existing slug resolves, no create
Unit test: unknown slug creates row with isNew=true

tasks.title: Echo campaign/batch resolution outcome in draft response
tasks.description:
Extend `CreateSocialDraftResponseSchema` (`packages/schemas/src/entities/social/social-draft.http.schema.ts`, additive-only per the schema-compat policy) with optional `campaignResolution`/`batchResolution: { id, slug, isNew } | null` fields. Wire `SocialDraftIngestionService.ingestDraft` to populate them from T-001's helper output so the GPT/operator can confirm whether a new campaign/batch was created.

Test requirements:
- Schema unit test: new fields parse as optional, absent = backward compatible with existing historic fixtures.
- Ingestion service test: response includes correct `isNew` value for both existing-slug and new-slug cases.

subtasks.title: Add campaignResolution/batchResolution to response schema
Populate fields in ingestDraft from T-001 helper
Schema compat test against historic fixtures

tasks.title: Update GPT-facing route descriptions for fuzzy-duplicate + implicit fallback
tasks.description:
Update the OpenAPI `description` text on `POST /api/v1/ai/social/drafts` (`apps/api/src/routes/ai/social/drafts.ts`) and `GET /api/v1/ai/social/catalog` (`apps/api/src/routes/ai/social/catalog.ts`) — these descriptions are the Custom GPT's own instructions (NG-2: no backend heuristic matching, so this is the only implementation surface for G-5's LLM-reasoning requirement). Instruct: (1) before submitting a new `campaignSlug`/`batchSlug` name, check the catalog's `campaigns`/`batches` arrays for a near-duplicate name and ask the operator to confirm "use existing" vs "create new"; (2) when no explicit slug is given, reason over the active campaigns/batches list against the draft content and propose an association when confident.

Test requirements:
- Update `apps/api/test/routes/social/admin/social-gpt-action-schema.test.ts` (or the drafts/catalog route test) to assert the generated OpenAPI description contains the new guidance text.

subtasks.title: Update drafts.ts route description
Update catalog.ts route description
Test: OpenAPI schema exposes updated description

tasks.title: Integration tests for batch/campaign auto-detection acceptance criteria
tasks.description:
Write integration tests against `POST /api/v1/ai/social/drafts` covering AC-1/AC-2/AC-3: (1) an explicit new campaign name creates a row and associates the draft; (2) an explicit existing slug associates without creating a duplicate; (3) a draft submitted with no explicit campaign/batch reference ships unassociated at the backend level (the implicit-fallback reasoning itself is GPT-side per T-003, so this test only verifies the backend's pass-through behavior when no slug is sent).

Test requirements:
- Add cases to the existing drafts route test file. Use realistic near-duplicate names ("Lanzamiento 2026" vs "Lanzamiento 26") as fixture data for AC-2's manual/GPT-side verification note in the test comment.

subtasks.title: Test: explicit new name creates + associates
Test: explicit existing slug associates only
Test: no explicit slug ships unassociated

No range = current all-time behavior (regression-safe default).

Test requirements:
- Unit tests: KPI counts change correctly for a bounded range; omitting the range preserves existing unfiltered totals (explicit regression assertion).

tasks.title: Audit social admin components for inline SVG / direct phosphor imports
tasks.description:
Grep `apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/social/` for inline `<svg>` elements and direct `phosphor-react`/`@phosphor-icons` imports. Produce an exact file+line inventory to drive T-018/T-019 (no code changes in this task).

Test requirements: none (discovery-only task); the inventory is verified by the fix tasks' own tests and the T-020 guard test.

AUDIT RESULT (2026-07-03): inventory is EMPTY. Zero inline `<svg>` and zero `phosphor-react`/`@phosphor-icons` imports in production code under `apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/social/`. Also checked lucide-react/react-icons/heroicons/@radix-ui/react-icons/react-feather: none present. The only `<svg>` occurrences (dashboard.test.tsx L112/119/126, post-list.test.tsx L57/64/71) are legitimate `vi.mock('@repo/icons', ...)` stubs that RENDER `<svg data-testid=...>` to fake the real icons — evidence that components consume `@repo/icons`, not a violation. SocialPostPlatformIcons.tsx already imports `{ FacebookIcon, InstagramIcon, XIcon } from '@repo/icons'` with an explicit "Icons come from @repo/icons only." comment. Consequence: T-018/T-019 have no replacement work (close by verification, like T-008); T-020's guard is the only real remaining G-9 work and its test already passes against the current tree.

subtasks.title: Grep inline <svg usages under routes/_authed/social/
Grep phosphor-react/@phosphor-icons imports under the same tree

Same close-by-verification precedent as T-008.

tasks.title: Add CI guard against inline SVG / direct phosphor imports in social admin
tasks.description:
Add a grep-based guard test (mirroring existing guard-test patterns in the repo) asserting no inline `<svg` or `phosphor-react`/`@phosphor-icons` imports remain under `apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/social/`. Satisfies AC-6.

Test requirements:
- New guard test file that fails CI if a future PR reintroduces an inline SVG or direct phosphor import in this tree.

DONE (2026-07-03): implemented `apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/social/__tests__/no-inline-icons.guard.test.ts`, mirroring `apps/admin/test/routes/__root.ssr-guard.test.ts`. It recursively walks the social subtree (production `.ts`/`.tsx` only; excludes `*.test.*` and `__tests__/` so the legitimate `vi.mock('@repo/icons')` `<svg>` stubs don't trip it), flags inline `<svg` and phosphor imports, and asserts zero. Includes a walk-not-empty sanity check plus 5 detector self-tests proving it catches inline svg / phosphor-react / @phosphor-icons and does not false-positive on a `.svg` filename or `@repo/icons` imports. 7/7 green; lint + typecheck clean.

tasks.title: Define public-data-pull response schema
tasks.description:
Add a new additive schema (`@repo/schemas`) for a draft-enrichment public-data-pull endpoint: an array of `{ entityType, id, title, slug, summary, imageUrl }` items. Scope tightly per R-1 (avoid a general-purpose public API aggregator) — this schema covers ONLY the entity shape needed for draft enrichment, not a general public API response.

Test requirements:
- Schema unit test validating the shape and that `entityType` is constrained to a small explicit enum (start with `ACCOMMODATION`, `DESTINATION`).

DONE (2026-07-03): created `packages/schemas/src/entities/social/social-public-data.http.schema.ts` exporting `SocialPublicDataEntityTypeEnumSchema` (z.enum ACCOMMODATION|DESTINATION), `SocialPublicDataItemSchema` ({entityType, id: uuid, title, slug, summary: nullable, imageUrl: url nullable}) and `SocialPublicDataResponseDataSchema` ({items: []}, object-wrapped like SocialCatalogResponseDataSchema for additive extensibility). Re-exported from the social entity index. 11 unit tests (enum accept/reject out-of-scope EVENT/POST/etc, item shape, nullables, uuid/url/required-title rejection, response list + empty + out-of-scope rejection). Lint + typecheck clean.

subtasks.title: Define enrichment item schema + entityType enum
Schema unit test

tasks.title: Implement public-data aggregation service
tasks.description:
Implement an aggregation method (new or on an existing service) that queries a tightly-scoped set of public entities — start with recently-published/featured accommodations and destinations ONLY (per R-1, do not add more entity types speculatively) — shaped per T-021's schema for draft enrichment. Accept an optional free-text query param to narrow results.

Test requirements:
- Unit tests: returns accommodations + destinations shaped correctly; free-text query narrows results; empty result set handled gracefully (no error).

DONE (2026-07-03): created `packages/service-core/src/services/social/social-public-data.service.ts` (new dedicated `SocialPublicDataService`, does NOT extend BaseCrudService / does NOT touch Accommodation/Destination services — R-1 scope-tight). Reads only PUBLIC + ACTIVE + non-deleted accommodations and destinations via `model.findAll`, merges + sorts by createdAt desc, bounds to a `limit` (default 20, max 50, total across both types). Optional free-text `query` narrows by name via `safeIlike` (never raw ilike) forwarded as additionalConditions. Maps to SocialPublicDataItem (title←name, imageUrl←media.featuredImage.url, summary nullable). Barrel-exported from social service index. 10 unit tests (shape per type, cross-type recency, null media/summary, safeIlike forward/omit/trim, empty state, INTERNAL_ERROR, limit clamp). Verified by orchestrator: git clean (no stray commit), 10/10 green re-run, lint+tsc clean, imageUrl mapping confirmed non-null-garbage (seed populates media.featuredImage — hostAccommodation.ts:466). Constructor takes only optional model overrides (no ServiceConfig — YAGNI, nothing consumes it; flagged + accepted).

subtasks.title: Implement aggregation query for accommodations + destinations
Support optional free-text narrowing param
Unit tests: shape, narrowing, empty state

tasks.title: Add public-data-pull API route
tasks.description:
Add a new route (`apps/api/src/routes/ai/social/public-data.ts`, following the `createApiKeyRoute` pattern used by `catalog.ts`/`drafts.ts` since it is GPT-consumed for draft enrichment) wiring T-022's service, authenticated the same way as the other `/api/v1/ai/social/*` routes.

Test requirements:
- Route test: auth (x-hospeda-ai-key) required; successful call returns the expected shape; free-text query param forwarded correctly.

DONE (2026-07-03): created `apps/api/src/routes/ai/social/public-data.ts` (GET, createApiKeyRoute, x-hospeda-ai-key via social vault, `requestQuery: { query: z.string().optional() }`, responseSchema SocialPublicDataResponseDataSchema). Unlike catalog.ts (which bypasses services because they're permission-gated), this route USES `SocialPublicDataService` directly — that service is intentionally permission-free, so the empty-permission gpt-action actor can call it. Handler maps service error → 500 envelope, success → `{ items }`. Exported as aiSocialPublicDataRoute from the ai/social barrel; mounted at `/api/v1/ai/social/public-data` in routes/index.ts. 8 route tests (shape, empty, query forward/omit, 500 on service error, 401 missing/wrong key, 200 pass-through). Lint + tsc clean; endpoint-gate-matrix guard still green (1188) — api-key routes correctly excluded.

subtasks.title: Create public-data.ts route
Register route under /api/v1/ai/social
Route test: auth + shape + query param

Test requirements:

DONE (2026-07-03): `apps/api/test/routes/social/ai/social-public-data-scope.test.ts` (6 tests). R-1 scope: asserts `SocialPublicDataEntityTypeEnumSchema.options` is exactly {ACCOMMODATION, DESTINATION} (fails + forces review if widened), response schema accepts the scoped payload and REJECTS out-of-scope types (EVENT/POST/ATTRACTION/USER). Auth: real apiKeyMiddleware mini-app returns 401 on missing key, 401 on wrong key, 200 on correct key. Lint + tsc clean. Completes G-10.
